raw.population: N: 12 (USA) [N:4 hepatic disease] Age: 52±11 WT: 89.3±18.9 [N:4 renal disease] Age: 54.5±5.2 WT: 77.3±11.8 [N:4 healthy] Age: 28.5±3.1 WT:87.8±9.2
raw.objective: “To investigate the pharmacokinetics of FOS in patients with hepatic or renal disease, this controlled open-label single-dose pharmacokinetic study was conducted”
raw.covariates: Tested: renal or hepatic disease Included: renal and hepatic disease
raw.observations: Non-compartmental kinetic analysis was performed to derive (non-linear) elimination rate differences between healthy subjects and patients with decreased renal or hepatic function. Contrary to what would be expected, elimination was increased in patients compared to the healthy controls.
raw.dose: Single i.v. dose in healthy subjects and renal or hepatic disease patients
raw.equations: [hepatic disease] CL=theta1*WT*(1+eta1) Vd=theta2*WT*(1+eta2) [renal disease] CL=theta3*WT*(1+eta3) Vd=theta4*WT*(1+eta4) [healthy subjects] CL=theta5*WT*(1+eta5) Vd=theta6*WT*(1+eta6)

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
